sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8964" key="a)nqupotima/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθυπο-τῑμάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n8964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reply to the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑποτίμησις</foreign> (q. v.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:150" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.150</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
